title: Neoplastic CD3⁺ B cells remodel the DLBCL tumor microenvironment via single-cell and spatial transcriptomics.
snippet: This study constructs a high-resolution multi-omics map of Diffuse Large B-Cell Lymphoma (DLBCL) by integrating single-cell, single-nucleus, and spatial transcriptomics. We identified a previously unrecognized, recurrent subset of malignant B cells that unexpectedly express CD3, a protein typically found only on T cells. This unusual CD3⁺ B cell popu...
